subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Divine Object of all desire! Open the eye of witness in the realm of existence, that the verses of the Tablets of the Supreme Concourse [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @interpretation of dreams and visions
